name: STEELE BANCORP INC
business: Steele Bancorp Inc is a bank holding company that, through its wholly-owned subsidiary Central Penn Bank & Trust, provides full-service commercial banking services including deposit accounts and loans to individuals, families, nonprofits, and businesses in central Pennsylvania.

exposures.sentence: In addition, implementation of new technologies, such as artificial intelligence, may have unintended consequences due to their limitations or the Company's failure to use them effectively.

Any failure, interruption or breach of the security of the Company’s information systems could result in failures or disruptions in its customer relationship management, general ledger, deposit, loan and other systems.
